name: pi-green-loop
description_en: Keep the build green: a polyglot, affected-test-scoped feedback loop for AI coding agents (Node/Python/Go/Rust/Make). Use as a CLI, an MCP server, a Claude/Cursor skill, or a pi extension.
description_zh: 保持构建绿色：AI 编码代理的多语言、受影响测试范围反馈循环（Node/Python/Go/Rust/Make）。可作为 CLI、MCP 服务器、Claude/Cursor 技能或 pi 扩展使用。
